message:
ftui: terminal focus tracking, query highlighting, and test fixes

- Wire Event::Focus(bool) → CassMsg::TerminalFocusChanged for
  terminal focus/blur detection (exceeds ratatui capability)
- Add focus:unfocused HUD lane when terminal loses focus
- Add query term highlighting in search result titles and snippets
  via highlight_query_spans() with themed STYLE_QUERY_HIGHLIGHT token
- Fix .content() → .content field access in highlight span tests
- Fix highlight_query_spans_case_insensitive test assertion (3 spans, not 4)
- Add 12 new tests for focus events, query highlighting, and term extraction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
